Privacy Policy

How Restore Physical Therapy collects, uses, and protects your information.

Information We Collect

We collect only the information necessary to provide care and respond to your inquiries, such as your name, contact details, and relevant health information you choose to share.

How We Use Your Information

Your information is used solely to deliver and coordinate your care, process billing, and communicate with you. We do not sell your personal information to third parties.

Your Privacy Rights

We follow applicable healthcare privacy regulations to safeguard your records. You may request access to or corrections of your information at any time by contacting our office.

Ready to Start Your Recovery?

Our team is here to guide you every step of the way. Reach out to schedule an evaluation or ask about our services.
